bio: Mehdi Qureishi served as a commander in the [IRGC Aerospace Force](/orgs/irgc-aerospace-force) under the [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps). He was killed on 20 March 2026 during the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave).
editorial_notes: Killed 20 March 2026. IRGC Aerospace Force commander.
